page: Microsoft Azure DC96eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine belonging to the DCEDV5 server family. This server is powered by an Intel processor utilizing the x86_64 architecture and runs on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated virtual CPUs (vCPUs) paired with 384.0 GB of system memory, yielding a resource density of 4.0 GB of RAM per core.

For local storage needs, the DC96eds_v5 is equipped with 2891 GB of local disk space and is capable of utilizing Premium Storage. This server configuration does not include any graphics processing units (GPUs), making it unsuitable for hardware-accelerated graphical or deep learning workloads. Additionally, the instance does not bundle any complimentary public IPv4 addresses.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the DC96eds_v5 offers a high-density allocation of dedicated compute cores and substantial local storage, making it a viable option for enterprise workloads requiring high resource density without the overhead of dedicated GPU hardware. The combination of 96 dedicated vCPUs, 384.0 GB of RAM, and fast local storage makes this server type well-suited for large-scale databases, memory-intensive enterprise applications, data warehousing, and high-throughput transactional systems.
description: The Microsoft Azure DC96eds_v5 is an x86_64 architecture virtual machine from the DCEDV5 server family, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. It features 96 dedicated vCPUs and 384.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This server includes 2891 GB of local disk storage and supports Premium Storage configurations, though it lacks integrated GPU hardware and complimentary public IPv4 addresses. Designed for resource-intensive deployments, the DC96eds_v5 offers qualitative cost efficiency for enterprise-scale workloads that demand high core counts and substantial local storage capacity. It is primarily suited for large-scale database management, memory-optimized enterprise applications, data warehousing, and transactional processing systems.
og_description: Microsoft Azure DC96eds_v5 is a memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 96 dedicated Intel vCPUs, 384 GB of RAM, and 2891 GB of local storage, designed for large-scale database workloads.

tagline: A high-density dedicated compute platform featuring ninety-six virtual cores, substantial system memory, and extensive local storage capacity.
